notes: E2.3 independent convolution (E2.2 ρ≈0). Stable per-side held-out-calibrated r_home=4.064 / r_away=3.398 (E2.1 train-fit r=8.527 was under-dispersed). Leakage-safe expanding-window calibration confirms r stable across seasons → single global per-side r served. Per-side (not shared) calibrates run-diff, which is sensitive to the home/away dispersion asymmetry the sum is blind to.
